headline: Top Procurement & Supply Chain Leaders Set to Speak in Chicago This Month
summary: London, 07/04/2026 – BizClik, Procurement Magazine and Supply Chain Digital have announced a strong lineup of industry leaders that will take the stage at Procurement & Supply Chain LIVE: The US Summit. Taking place at Navy Pier, Chicago, on 21-22 April 2026, the speaker line-up features executives from leading global organisations including PepsiCo, Constellation Brands, Regions Bank, Coinbase, Reynolds American, Trane Technologies, and BDO USA.
